info.title: timeline-pulse data API
info.description: Read-only access to the Timeline Pulse corpus: timeline-shift folklore, Mandela Effect reports, motifs, events, and story threads — every claim labeled, every source graded. For rich querying, use the MCP server: npx -y timeline-pulse.

get.summary: All reports (seed v0.1: 20 records) with claims, grades, motifs, anchors, and safety flags.
Motif constellation: 17 nodes with families and frequencies, plus weighted co-occurrence edges.
Timeline events in three labeled layers: official-science (cited), community-wave, symbolic-anchor.
Mandela Effect catalog: remembered vs on-record variants with community and mainstream notes.
Curated narrative arcs written in belief / neutral / skeptical frames.
Source-family registry and per-family policies (including the omitted-teacher rule).
